chunks.title: Nehemiah Requests Permission from the King
chunks.reason: A continuous conversation between Nehemiah and King Artaxerxes where he requests leave to rebuild Jerusalem.

chunks.title: Arrival and Night Inspection of the Walls
chunks.reason: Narrative account of Nehemiah's journey to Jerusalem and his secret inspection of the city's ruins.

chunks.title: Mobilization and Opposition
chunks.reason: Combines Nehemiah's exhortation to the leaders with the reaction of their enemies.
